Our Programs

We Meet Kids At Their Level
Regardless Of Their Age

Pre Nursery

1.5 - 2.5 years

Gentle introduction to structure

Nursery

2.5 - 3.5 years

Building language & motor skills

LKG

3.5 - 4.5 years

Letters, numbers & creativity

UKG

4.5 - 6 years

School readiness & preparation

How May We Help
You?

What Clients Say

"Awesome preschool with lovely teachers who genuinely care about the kids. My child looks forward to going to school every single day. Safe and nurturing environment!"

Priya Sharma

Mother of Ananya, 4 yrs

"The play-based approach gave my shy son the confidence to make friends and express himself. We've seen incredible growth in just 6 months. Highly recommended!"

Rajesh Mehta

Father of Arjun, 3 yrs

"As a parent, safety is my top priority. The CCTV, trained staff, and constant updates from teachers gave me complete peace of mind from day one."

Sunita Patel

Mother of Keya, 5 yrs

"The teachers truly know each child by name and personality. My daughter's language development has been remarkable. So grateful for The Foundation!"

Amit Joshi

Father of Riya, 4 yrs

"Best decision we made for our child's early education. The curriculum is well-structured yet fun. The staff is always welcoming and professional."

Neha Gupta

Mother of Rohan, 3 yrs
